scenarios.request: Review the comments in comments.docx, summarize open issues, and preserve tracked review context.
Inspect footnotes.docx, explain the document structure, and verify footnote references stay intact.
Inspect tables.docx, map the table structure, and verify scoped edits would target the correct table region.
Inspect text-box.docx and verify that non-body text content is surfaced clearly in diagnostics.
Rewrite content in strict-format.docx while preserving formatting exactly and rereading after the change.
Rewrite the list content in simple-list.docx while preserving numbering and indentation.
Inspect having-images.docx, compare structure to screenshots, and verify image-heavy content does not confuse the UI.
Inspect blk-inner-content.docx and verify nested block content is represented accurately in structure tools.
Inspect Headers.docx, verify header-linked structure handling, and ensure rereads include header-sensitive context.
Inspect toc.docx, verify table-of-contents structure handling, and keep navigation-related content stable.
